description: Use this API to to specify or return the option set the transmission line units to either per unit or ohms. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = transmission_line_units(ival) ierr, ival = transmission_line_units()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 0 by default; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
